name: todoist-gcal-daemon
description: One-way sync daemon: Todoist -> Google Calendar.

scripts.docker:publish: docker buildx inspect multiarch >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker buildx create --name multiarch --driver docker-container && docker buildx inspect multiarch --bootstrap && docker buildx build --builder multiarch --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t yashpatel21/todoist-gcal-daemon:latest --push .
